digest.component_or_area: gating test workflow / CI test runs
propositions: The gating test suite runs serially and is the dominant cost of the build-and-test job (~22 min), which pytest-xdist parallelization can cut ~5x.
Add pytest-xdist and pytest-split pinned exactly to the [dev] extra and switch default-suite commands to run with a pinned -n matching real vCPU count (-n4 ubuntu, -n3 macos), not -n auto.
Coverage under xdist silently deflates the combined TOTAL (~37% vs true 80%) and leaks worker data files unless parallel = true is set in [tool.coverage.run].
Non-live integration tests are xdist-safe and should run under -n4, but live Jira tests flake under parallel load and must stay serial or be confined via xdist_group with --dist loadgroup.
Document in docs/coverage.md that coverage collection under pytest-xdist requires parallel = true to keep the combine correct (satisfies parent epic AC-3).
